ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Continued To Sep-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexandra Ayoub for (petitioner) Paul Lowry.

The Court stated that it needs a petition for final distribution. Ms. Ayoub reported that they have one that was prepared in February, that at the time they did not know that they had to e-file the petition, that the attorney (Mr. Ferguson) had health issues and that they need to set up e-filing. The status on filing a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a status report was continued to September 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Continued To Aug-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Paul Lowry to appear on August 29, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
